subcodes.first_line: O thou who treadest the path of love and drinkest from the chalice of mercy! Know thou that it hath reached Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها السالک فی صراط المحبه و الشارب عن کاس المرحمه فاعلم قد وصل الینا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @presence of; reunion with God, @love of God, @mystical themes, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
